claims.headline: Focus under stress
claims.notesSentence: Tyrosine supplementation mitigated working-memory decrements during cold-stress exposure in healthy adults.

source.label: PubMed
source.linkTitle: Tyrosine working memory cold-stress study on PubMed

claims.headline: Cognition under demands
